-- DROP SCHEMA AxionPro;

CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS axionpro;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;
SET search_path = axionpro, public;
-- axionpro."ApprovalWorkflow" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."ApprovalWorkflow";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."ApprovalWorkflow" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ProjectChildModuleDetailId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ActionName" varchar(150)  NOT NULL,
	"WorkflowName" varchar(150)  NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Approval__3214EC071F76BFC6" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AssetStatus" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetStatus";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetStatus" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"StatusName" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedById" bigint DEFAULT 0 NULL,
    "UpdatedDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
    "SoftDeletedById" bigint DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"ColorKey" varchar(50)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetSta__3214EC0722A59445" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__AssetSta__05E7698A7AA7A28E" UNIQUE ("StatusName")
);


-- axionpro."AssignmentStatus" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssignmentStatus";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssignmentStatus" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"StatusName" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Assignme__3214EC07BCFD76FA" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Attendance" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Attendance";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Attendance" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDate" date NOT NULL,
	"DeviceId" int NOT NULL,
    "Latitude" double precision NULL,
    "Longitude" double precision NULL,
	"AttendanceImagePath" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"AttendanceImageURL" varchar(200)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Attendan__3214EC079EEE2ABB" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AttendanceDeviceType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AttendanceDeviceType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AttendanceDeviceType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"DeviceType" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"IsDeviceRegister" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK_AttendanceDeviceType" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AttendanceRequest" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AttendanceRequest";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AttendanceRequest" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDate" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDeviceTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"WorkstationTypeId" int NOT NULL,
    "Latitude" double precision NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
    "Longitude" double precision NULL,
	"AttendanceImagePath" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"AttendanceImageURL" varchar(200)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Attendan__3214EC07DA4D2CA6" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Candidate" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Candidate";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Candidate" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"FirstName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"LastName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Email" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"PhoneNumber" varchar(15)  NOT NULL,
	"PAN" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"Aadhaar" varchar(12)  NULL,
	"CandidateReferenceCode" varchar(20)  NOT NULL,
	"IsBlacklisted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"ExperienceYears" decimal(4,1) NOT NULL,
	"CurrentLocation" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"ExpectedSalary" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"CurrentCompany" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"NoticePeriod" int NULL,
	"DateOfBirth" date NULL,
	"AppliedDate" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "LastUpdatedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NULL,
	"SkillSet" text  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"ActionStatus" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"Education" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IsFresher" boolean NULL,
	"FewWords" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"ResumePath" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"ResumeURL" varchar(200)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Candidat__3214EC078AAEC326" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Candidat__85FB4E384EF74606" UNIQUE ("PhoneNumber"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Candidat__A9D10534B67C36A0" UNIQUE ("Email"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Candidat__C4B3336970636589" UNIQUE ("Aadhaar"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Candidat__C577943D11665D42" UNIQUE ("PAN"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Candidat__CF22B81A936408F4" UNIQUE ("CandidateReferenceCode")
);
ALTER TABLE axionpro."Candidate"  ADD CONSTRAINT "CK__Candidate__Expec__5006DFF2" CHECK ("ExpectedSalary" >= 0);
ALTER TABLE axionpro."Candidate"  ADD CONSTRAINT "CK__Candidate__Exper__50FB042B" CHECK ("ExperienceYears" >= 0);
ALTER TABLE axionpro."Candidate"  ADD CONSTRAINT "CK__Candidate__Notic__51EF2864" CHECK ("NoticePeriod" >= 0);


-- axionpro."ClientType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."ClientType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."ClientType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TypeName" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__ClientTy__3214EC078D984A16" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Country" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Country";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Country" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"CountryName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"CountryCode" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Country__3214EC070584DCC0" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."DataViewStructure" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."DataViewStructure";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."DataViewStructure" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"DisplayOn" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Discription" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"IsDisplayedAtPriority" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK_DataViewStructure" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."DemoRequest" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."DemoRequest";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."DemoRequest" (
    "Id" varchar(50)  DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text NOT NULL,
	"FirstName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"LastName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"WorkEmail" varchar(150)  NOT NULL,
	"CompanyName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"ContactNumber" varchar(20)  NOT NULL,
	"IndustryType" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"NumberOfEmployees" int NULL,
	"CurrentHRMS" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"IsBiometricRequired" boolean NULL,
	"HasExistingBiometric" boolean NULL,
	"RequiresIntegration" boolean NULL,
	"RequiredMachineCount" int NULL,
	"DeploymentPreference" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"HRChallenges" text  NULL,
	"Status" varchar(50)  DEFAULT 'Pending' NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__DemoRequ__3214EC0796C55902" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."DistrictMaster" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."DistrictMaster";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."DistrictMaster" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"StateId" int NOT NULL,
	"DistrictCode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"PinCode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"DistrictName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__District__3214EC07D509FB7C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmailTemplate" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmailTemplate";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmailTemplate" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TemplateName" varchar(150)  NOT NULL,
	"TemplateCode" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Subject" varchar(250)  NOT NULL,
	"Body" text  NOT NULL,
	"FromEmail" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"FromName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"CcEmail" text  NULL,
	"BccEmail" text  NULL,
	"Category" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"LanguageCode" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"AddedFromIP" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"UpdatedFromIP" varchar(50)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__EmailTem__3214EC072FE49A64" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmailsLog" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmailsLog";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmailsLog" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmailQueueId" bigint NULL,
	"TemplateId" int NOT NULL,
	"ToEmail" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
	"CcEmail" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"BccEmail" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"Subject" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
	"Body" text  NOT NULL,
	"Status" varchar(20)  DEFAULT 'Queued' NOT NULL,
	"ErrorMessage" varchar(1000)  NULL,
    "RetryCount" int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    "SentDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
    "CreatedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" int NOT NULL,
	"TriggeredBy" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"AdditionalInfoJson" text  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedFromIp" varchar(50)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__EmailsLo__3214EC0779530258" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeEducation" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeEducation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeEducation" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
    "Degree" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"InstituteName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"StartDate" date NULL,
	"EndDate" date NULL,
	"ScoreValue" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"GradeDivision" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"EducationGap" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"ReasonOfEducationGap" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"FilePath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"FileType" int NULL,
	"FileName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"HasEducationDocUploded" boolean NULL,
	"ScoreType" int NULL,
    "GapYears" double precision NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK_EmployeeEducation" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeExperience" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeExperience";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeExperience" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NULL,
	"CTC" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"Comment" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
    "UpdatedDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
    "DeletedDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"HasEPFAccount" boolean NULL,
	"IsFresher" boolean NULL,
	"IsForeignExperience" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC071B15DEB3" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeInsurancePolicy" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeInsurancePolicy";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeInsurancePolicy" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NULL,
	"InsurancePolicyId" int NULL,
	"AssignedDate" date NULL,
	"Description" text  NULL,
	"CreatedDate" date NULL,
	"ApprovedById" bigint NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC0705F48FB6" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TypeName" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC0760C5ED38" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeWorkProfile" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeWorkProfile";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeWorkProfile" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"IsFresher" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Comment" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT timezone('utc', now()) NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07605A7EB3" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."ForgotPasswordOTPDetail" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."ForgotPasswordOTPDetail";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."ForgotPasswordOTPDetail" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"UserId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"OTP" varchar(10)  NOT NULL,
	"OTPExpireDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"IsUsed" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
    "CreatedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UsedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"IsValidate" boolean NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__ForgotPa__3214EC071E853072" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Gender" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Gender";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Gender" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"GenderName" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Gender__3214EC07EF3CD03D" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Gender__F7C177153AF55502" UNIQUE ("GenderName")
);


-- axionpro."HolidayMaster" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."HolidayMaster";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."HolidayMaster" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
    "Year" int NOT NULL,
	"HolidayDate" date NOT NULL,
	"HolidayName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"Region" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IsRegionalHoliday" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsWeekend" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
    "UpdatedDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__HolidayM__3214EC0743457A80" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);
-- Finished_1

-- axionpro."IdentityCategory" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."IdentityCategory";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."IdentityCategory" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"Code" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Name" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedDateTime" timestamptz NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Identity__3214EC07393AF557" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Identity__A25C5AA7EC142E9A" UNIQUE ("Code")
);


-- axionpro."InterviewPanel" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."InterviewPanel";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."InterviewPanel" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PanelName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsApproved" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Remarks" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Intervie__3214EC07076FDC5F" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."InterviewSdule" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."InterviewSdule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."InterviewSdule" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"ScheduledDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"InterviewerId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"InterviewMode" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Status" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Remarks" text  NULL,
	"Description" text  NULL,
	"CreatedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Intervie__3214EC0702C95E26" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."LeaveSandwichRule" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."LeaveSandwichRule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."LeaveSandwichRule" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"RuleName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"IsIncludeHoliday" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsIncludeWeekend" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LeaveSan__3214EC0757F4038B" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

-- Finished_2

-- axionpro."LeaveTransactionLog" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."LeaveTransactionLog";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."LeaveTransactionLog" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeLeaveBalanceId" bigint NULL,
	"TransactionType" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"LeaveDays" decimal(5,2) NULL,
	"TransactionDate" timestamp NULL,
	"PerformedBy" bigint NULL,
	"Remarks" varchar(500)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LeaveTra__3214EC0737FE86DD" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."License" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."License";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."License" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"LicenseStartDate" timestamp NULL,
	"LicenseEndDate" timestamp NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__License__3214EC07FF575687" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

-- Finished_3
-- axionpro."NoImagePath" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."NoImagePath";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."NoImagePath" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"ImageName" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"DefaultImagePath" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
	"ImageType" int DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__NoImageP__3214EC07B56BC19F" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Operation" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Operation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Operation" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"OperationName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"OperationType" int NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdateDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IconImage" varchar(250)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Operatio__3214EC079C437610" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."PageTypeEnum" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."PageTypeEnum";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."PageTypeEnum" (
	"Id" int NOT NULL,
	"PageTypeName" varchar(20)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__PageType__3214EC07D71C5D81" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."ReportingType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."ReportingType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."ReportingType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TypeName" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Reportin__3214EC0773736C22" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Reportin__D4E7DFA8AC2E2E45" UNIQUE ("TypeName")
);


-- axionpro."Role" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Role";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Role" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"RoleName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"RoleType" int DEFAULT NULL NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  DEFAULT NULL NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSystemDefault" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint DEFAULT NULL NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT NULL NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT NULL NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Role__3214EC0723371271" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."ServiceProvider" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."ServiceProvider";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."ServiceProvider" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"CompanyName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Location" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Address" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
	"PinCode" varchar(10)  NOT NULL,
	"Profile" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"CompanyEmail" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Fax" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Phone" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"CEOName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"GSTNumber" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"WebsiteURL" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"EstablishedYear" int NULL,
	"CompanyType" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__ServiceP__3214EC07B0695346" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."SubscriptionPlan" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."SubscriptionPlan";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."SubscriptionPlan" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PlanName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"MaxUsers" int NOT NULL,
	"PerDayPrice" decimal(10,2) NULL,
	"MonthlyPrice" decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	"YearlyPrice" decimal(10,2) NULL,
	"IsFree" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"CurrencyKey" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"IsMostPopular" boolean NULL,
	"IsCustom" boolean NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Subscrip__3214EC07BED0F0D0" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenantEncryptionKeys" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenantEncryptionKeys";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenantEncryptionKeys" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"EncryptionKey" varchar(1000)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantEn__3214EC070E3540EE" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ_TenantKey_TenantId" UNIQUE ("TenantId")
);

	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,

	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantIn__3214EC0765258C5E" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

	"ApproverReferenceId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"IsMandatory" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"EscalateAfterDays" int NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,

	"MenuURL" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"ParentMenuId" int NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"ImageIcon" varchar(100)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK_BasicMenu_Id" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_BasicMenu_ParentMenu" FOREIGN KEY ("ParentMenuId") REFERENCES axionpro."BasicMenu"("Id")
);

	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,

	"Status" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Reason" text  NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ReapplyAllowedAfter" timestamp NULL,
    "CreatedDateTime" timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Candidat__3214EC07F93DEB9C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Candidate__Candi__17C286CF" FOREIGN KEY ("CandidateId") REFERENCES axionpro."Candidate"("Id")
);

	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"ParentID" int NULL,
	"Name" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Code" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Depth" int NOT NULL,
	"Tags" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Category__3214EC070D4D0C80" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Category_Parent" FOREIGN KEY ("ParentID") REFERENCES axionpro."Category"("Id")
);

	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK_TenderClient" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Client_ClientType" FOREIGN KEY ("ClientTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."ClientType"("Id")
);

    "Id" varchar(50)  DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text NOT NULL,
	"DemoRequestId" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"BiometricCompanyName" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"ModelNumber" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"MachineCount" int NULL,
	"MachineLocation" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__DemoRequ__3214EC0746BD550C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_DemoRequestBiometric" FOREIGN KEY ("DemoRequestId") REFERENCES axionpro."DemoRequest"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmailQueue";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmailQueue" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TemplateId" int NOT NULL,
	"ToEmail" varchar(250)  NOT NULL,
	"CcEmail" text  NULL,
	"BccEmail" text  NULL,
	"Subject" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"Body" text  NULL,
	"IsSent" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"SendDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"ErrorMessage" text  NULL,
	"RetryCount" int DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__EmailQue__3214EC0705218438" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__EmailQueu__Templ__44B528D7" FOREIGN KEY ("TemplateId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmailTemplate"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeWorkHistory";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeWorkHistory" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeWorkProfileId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"CompanyName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"Designation" varchar(150)  NOT NULL,
	"CTC" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"StartDate" date NOT NULL,
	"EndDate" date NULL,
	"ReasonForLeaving" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"WorkingCountryId" bigint NULL,
	"WorkingStateId" bigint NULL,
	"WorkingDistrictId" bigint NULL,
	"IsWFH" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsForeignExperience" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"ReportingManagerName" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"ReportingManagerNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"VerificationEmail" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"IsVerified" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"VerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"VerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"VerificationMode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07994D46FA" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeWorkHistory_Profile" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeWorkProfileId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeWorkProfile"("Id")
);

	"Rating" decimal(3,1) NULL,

	"ReapplyAfter" timestamp NULL,

	CONSTRAINT "PK__Intervie__3214EC07C20637CB" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Interview__Candi__2AD55B43" FOREIGN KEY ("CandidateId") REFERENCES axionpro."Candidate"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Interview__Inter__2BC97F7C" FOREIGN KEY ("InterviewScheduleId") REFERENCES axionpro."InterviewSdule"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."InterviewSchedule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."InterviewSchedule" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"CandidateId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"PanelId" int NOT NULL,
	"ScheduledDate" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remarks" varchar(255)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Intervie__3214EC073C91635C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InterviewSchedule_Candidate" FOREIGN KEY ("CandidateId") REFERENCES axionpro."Candidate"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE,
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InterviewSchedule_Panel" FOREIGN KEY ("PanelId") REFERENCES axionpro."InterviewPanel"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."Module" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Module";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Module" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"ModuleCode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"ModuleName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"DisplayName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"URLPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"ParentModuleId" int NULL,
	"IsLeafNode" boolean NULL,
	"IsModuleDisplayInUI" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsCommonMenu" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"ImageIconWeb" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"ImageIconMobile" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"ItemPriority" int DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Module__3214EC078891AB2D" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Module_ParentModule" FOREIGN KEY ("ParentModuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Module"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."ModuleOperationMapping" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."ModuleOperationMapping";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."ModuleOperationMapping" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"ModuleId" int NULL,
	"OperationId" int NOT NULL,
	"DataViewStructureId" int NULL,
	"PageTypeId" int NULL,
	"PageURL" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IconURL" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsCommonItem" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"IsOperational" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"Priority" int DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__ModuleOp__3214EC07BF86A196" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_ModuleOperationMapping_DataViewStructure" FOREIGN KEY ("DataViewStructureId") REFERENCES axionpro."DataViewStructure"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_ModuleOperationMapping_Module" FOREIGN KEY ("ModuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Module"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_ModuleOperationMapping_PageTypeEnum" FOREIGN KEY ("PageTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PageTypeEnum"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_ModuleOperation_Operation" FOREIGN KEY ("OperationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Operation"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."PlanModuleMapping";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."PlanModuleMapping" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"SubscriptionPlanId" int NOT NULL,
	"ModuleId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__PlanModu__3214EC0729948732" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_PMM_SubscriptionPlan" FOREIGN KEY ("SubscriptionPlanId") REFERENCES axionpro."SubscriptionPlan"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_PlanModuleMapping_Module" FOREIGN KEY ("ModuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Module"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."PolicyLeaveTypeMapping" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."PolicyLeaveTypeMapping";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."PolicyLeaveTypeMapping" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"LeaveTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"EmployeeTypeId" int NULL,
	"ApplicableGenderId" int NULL,
	"IsMarriedApplicable" boolean NULL,
	"IsEmployeeMapped" boolean NULL,
	"TotalLeavesPerYear" int NOT NULL,
	"MonthlyAccrual" boolean NOT NULL,
	"CarryForward" boolean NOT NULL,
	"MaxCarryForward" int NULL,
	"CarryForwardExpiryMonths" int NULL,
	"Encashable" boolean NOT NULL,
	"MaxEncashable" int NULL,
	"IsProofRequired" boolean NOT NULL,
	"ProofDocumentType" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"EffectiveFrom" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"EffectiveTo" timestamp NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeleteById" bigint NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LeavePol__3214EC07A76146FC" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_PolicyLeaveTypeMapping_Gender" FOREIGN KEY ("ApplicableGenderId") REFERENCES axionpro."Gender"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."RoleModuleAndPermission" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."RoleModuleAndPermission";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."RoleModuleAndPermission" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"RoleId" int NULL,
	"ModuleId" int NULL,
	"OperationId" int NULL,
	"HasAccess" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsOperational" boolean NULL,
	"ImageIcon" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdateDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK_RoleModuleAndPermission_Id" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_RoleModulePermission_Module" FOREIGN KEY ("ModuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Module"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_RoleModulePermission_Operation" FOREIGN KEY ("OperationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Operation"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_RoleModulePermission_Role" FOREIGN KEY ("RoleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Role"("Id")
);
 CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_RolesPermission_OperationId" ON axionpro."RoleModuleAndPermission"("OperationId");
 CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_RolesPermission_RoleId" ON axionpro."RoleModuleAndPermission"("RoleId");


-- axionpro."State" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."State";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."State" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"StateName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"CountryId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__State__3214EC0705AF0D74" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__State__CountryId__6B0FDBE9" FOREIGN KEY ("CountryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Country"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."StatutoryType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."StatutoryType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."StatutoryType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"Code" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"Name" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"CountryId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsEmployeeContributionRequired" boolean NOT NULL,
	"IsEmployerContributionRequired" boolean NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Statutor__3214EC078EED6601" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_StatutoryType_Country" FOREIGN KEY ("CountryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Country"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Tenant" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Tenant";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Tenant" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantIndustryId" int NOT NULL,
	"CompanyName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"TenantCode" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"CompanyEmailDomain" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"TenantEmail" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"ContactPersonName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"GenderId" int NULL,
	"ContactNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"CountryId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsVerified" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Tenant__3214EC0728DD7C6E" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__Tenant__F7C944DD7E3D53D9" UNIQUE ("TenantEmail"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Gender_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("GenderId") REFERENCES axionpro."Gender"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Tenant_TenantIndustry" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantIndustryId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenantIndustry"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenantEmailConfig" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenantEmailConfig";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenantEmailConfig" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"SmtpHost" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"SmtpPort" int NULL,
	"SmtpUsername" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"SmtpPasswordEncrypted" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"FromEmail" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"FromName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantEm__3214EC077A90B3A3" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantEmailConfig_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."TenantEnabledModule" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenantEnabledModule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenantEnabledModule" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ParentModuleId" int NULL,
	"ModuleId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsLeafNode" boolean NULL,
	"IsEnabled" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantEn__3214EC07AC610092" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantEnabledModules_Module" FOREIGN KEY ("ModuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Module"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantEnabledModules_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenantEnabledOperation" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenantEnabledOperation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenantEnabledOperation" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ModuleId" int NOT NULL,
	"OperationId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsOperationUsed" boolean NULL,
	"IsEnabled" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantEn__3214EC07047C5B46" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantEnabledOperations_Module" FOREIGN KEY ("ModuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Module"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantEnabledOperations_Operation" FOREIGN KEY ("OperationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Operation"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantEnabledOperations_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);
 CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "UQ_Tenant_Module_Operation" ON axionpro."TenantEnabledOperation"("TenantId", "ModuleId", "OperationId");


-- axionpro."TenantProfile" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenantProfile";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenantProfile" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"Address" varchar(300)  NULL,
	"LogoUrl" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"ThemeColor" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"BusinessType" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Industry" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"TotalEmployees" int NULL,
	"TotalBranches" int NULL,
	"FoundedYear" int NULL,
	"WebsiteUrl" varchar(200)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantPr__3214EC0796A1B93D" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantProfile_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."TenantSubscription" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenantSubscription";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenantSubscription" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"SubscriptionPlanId" int NOT NULL,
	"SubscriptionStartDate" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"SubscriptionEndDate" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsTrial" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"PaymentTxnId" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"PaymentMode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenantSu__3214EC07CF143048" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantSubscription_Plan" FOREIGN KEY ("SubscriptionPlanId") REFERENCES axionpro."SubscriptionPlan"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenantSubscription_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Tender" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Tender";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Tender" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"ClientId" int NOT NULL,
	"TenderStatusId" int NOT NULL,
	"TenderName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"TenderValue" decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
	"EndDate" date NULL,
	"StartDate" date NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Tender__3214EC076E847502" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Tender_ClientId" FOREIGN KEY ("ClientId") REFERENCES axionpro."ClientType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Tender__TenderSt__3EDC53F0" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderStatusId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderStatus"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenderService" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenderService";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenderService" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenderId" int NOT NULL,
	"TenderServiceTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenderSe__3214EC07620086F4" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TenderSer__Tende__43A1090D" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tender"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TenderSer__Tende__44952D46" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderServiceTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderServiceType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenderServiceSpecification" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenderServiceSpecification";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenderServiceSpecification" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenderServiceId" int NOT NULL,
	"SpecificationType" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"SpecificationName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Quantity" int NOT NULL,
	"ProductPlatform" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"ProductSpecification" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"ExperienceRequired" int NULL,
	"NoticePeriodConsidered" int NULL,
	"EstimatedBudget" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenderSe__3214EC07FBF10311" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenderServiceSpecification_TenderService" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderServiceId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderService"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TicketClassification" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TicketClassification";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TicketClassification" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"ClassificationName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TicketCl__3214EC07BA509F8F" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TicketClassification_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TicketHeader" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TicketHeader";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TicketHeader" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"HeaderName" varchar(150)  NOT NULL,
	"TicketClassificationId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsAssetRelated" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TicketHe__3214EC07EADE3F1B" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TicketHeaderType_TicketClassification" FOREIGN KEY ("TicketClassificationId") REFERENCES axionpro."TicketClassification"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TicketHeader_TenantId" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id") ON UPDATE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."TicketType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TicketType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TicketType" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TicketTypeName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"TicketHeaderId" bigint NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"ResponsibleRoleId" int NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TicketTy__3214EC07554DC568" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TicketType_Header" FOREIGN KEY ("TicketHeaderId") REFERENCES axionpro."TicketHeader"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TicketType_ResponsibleRole" FOREIGN KEY ("ResponsibleRoleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Role"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TicketType_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetCategory";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetCategory" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"CategoryName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetCat__3214EC07E9FE2792" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetCategory_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AssetCategoryId" bigint NULL,
	"TypeName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetTyp__3214EC077375A9AA" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ__AssetTyp__D4E7DFA8692FD5DF" UNIQUE ("TypeName"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetType_AssetCategory" FOREIGN KEY ("AssetCategoryId") REFERENCES axionpro."AssetCategory"("Id")
);

	CONSTRAINT "FK__Candidate__Categ__16CE6296" FOREIGN KEY ("CategoryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Category"("Id")

	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"CityName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"StateId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__City__3214EC07DC3B7144" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__City__StateId__6EE06CCD" FOREIGN KEY ("StateId") REFERENCES axionpro."State"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."CountryIdentityRule" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."CountryIdentityRule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."CountryIdentityRule" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"CountryId" int NOT NULL,
	"IdentityCategoryDocumentId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsMandatory" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__CountryI__3214EC0748E4A649" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Country" FOREIGN KEY ("CountryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Country"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Country_Document" FOREIGN KEY ("IdentityCategoryDocumentId") REFERENCES axionpro."IdentityCategoryDocument"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."CountryStatutoryRule" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."CountryStatutoryRule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."CountryStatutoryRule" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"CountryId" int NOT NULL,
	"StatutoryTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsMandatory" boolean NOT NULL,
	"SalaryThreshold" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__CountryS__3214EC07068D8E4F" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_CountryStatutoryRule_Country" FOREIGN KEY ("CountryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Country"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_CountryStatutoryRule_Statutory" FOREIGN KEY ("StatutoryTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."StatutoryType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."DayCombination" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."DayCombination";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."DayCombination" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"CombinationName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"StartDay" int NOT NULL,
	"EndDay" int NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__DayCombi__3214EC070D2CF976" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_DayCombination_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Department" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Department";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Department" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"DepartmentName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsExecutiveOffice" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Departme__3214EC071E7B0B0B" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Department_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Designation" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Designation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Designation" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"DepartmentId" int NULL,
	"DesignationName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Designat__3214EC07F9FF4C75" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Designation_Department" FOREIGN KEY ("DepartmentId") REFERENCES axionpro."Department"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Designation_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."District" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."District";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."District" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"StateId" int NOT NULL,
	"DistrictCode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"PinCode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"DistrictName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__District__3214EC07CB6A47D0" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_District_State" FOREIGN KEY ("StateId") REFERENCES axionpro."State"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
);
 CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_District_DistrictName" ON axionpro."District"("DistrictName");
 CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_District_StateId" ON axionpro."District"("StateId");


-- axionpro."Employee" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Employee";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Employee" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"EmployeeDocumentId" int NULL,
	"EmployementCode" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"LastName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"MiddleName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"GenderId" int NULL,
	"FirstName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"DateOfBirth" timestamp NULL,
	"DateOfOnBoarding" timestamp NULL,
	"DateOfExit" timestamp NULL,
	"DesignationId" int NULL,
	"EmployeeTypeId" int NULL,
	"DepartmentId" int NULL,
	"OfficialEmail" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"HasPermanent" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"FunctionalId" int NULL,
	"ReferalId" int NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"CountryId" int NOT NULL,
	"EmergencyContactNumber" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Relation" int NULL,
	"BloodGroup" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"MobileNumber" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IsMarried" boolean NULL,
	"EmergencyContactPerson" varchar(100)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07E3264254" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Employee_Country" FOREIGN KEY ("CountryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Country"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Employee_Designation" FOREIGN KEY ("DesignationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Designation"("Id") ON DELETE SET NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Employee_EmployeeType" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Employee_Gender" FOREIGN KEY ("GenderId") REFERENCES axionpro."Gender"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Employee_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
);
 CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "UX_Employee_SystemUser_OnlyOnce" ON axionpro."Employee"("OfficialEmail");
 CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "UX_Employee_TenantIdNullOnce" ON axionpro."Employee"("Id");
 CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "UX_Employee_TenantId_Null_OnlyOnce" ON axionpro."Employee"("Id");


-- axionpro."EmployeeBankDetail" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeBankDetail";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeBankDetail" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"BankName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"AccountNumber" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IFSCCode" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"BranchName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"AccountType" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"UPIId" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IsPrimaryAccount" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"HasChequeDocUploaded" boolean NULL,
	"FileName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"FilePath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"FileType" int NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC072E9F930F" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeBank_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);
ALTER TABLE axionpro."EmployeeBankDetail" ADD CONSTRAINT "CK__EmployeeB__Accou__7D98A078" CHECK ("AccountType" IN ('Salary','Current','Savings'));


-- axionpro."EmployeeCategorySkill" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeCategorySkill";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeCategorySkill" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"CategoryId" int NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07BB3C49C9" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeCategorySkill_Category" FOREIGN KEY ("CategoryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Category"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE,
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeCategorySkill_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeCodePattern" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeCodePattern";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeCodePattern" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"Prefix" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"IncludeYear" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IncludeMonth" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IncludeDepartment" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Separator" varchar(5)  DEFAULT '/' NOT NULL,
	"RunningNumberLength" int DEFAULT 4 NOT NULL,
	"LastUsedNumber" int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamp(0) DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp(0) NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC070ECDA69B" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeCodePattern_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeContact" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeContact";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeContact" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ContactType" int NULL,
	"Relation" int NULL,
	"ContactName" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"ContactNumber" varchar(20)  NOT NULL,
	"AlternateNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"Email" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IsPrimary" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"CountryId" int NULL,
	"StateId" int NULL,
	"DistrictId" int NULL,
	"HouseNo" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"LandMark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"Street" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"Address" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07371CFD87" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeContact_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeDailyAttendance" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeDailyAttendance";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeDailyAttendance" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDate" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDeviceTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"WorkstationTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"Latitude" float NULL,
	"Longitude" float NULL,
	"IsLate" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"ClickedImage" bytea NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NOT NULL,
	"IsMarked" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC078C36F2DB" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AttendanceDeviceType" FOREIGN KEY ("AttendanceDeviceTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."AttendanceDeviceType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_WorkstationType" FOREIGN KEY ("WorkstationTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."WorkstationType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeDependent" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeDependent";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeDependent" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NULL,
	"DependentName" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"Relation" int NULL,
	"DateOfBirth" timestamp NULL,
	"IsCoveredInPolicy" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"IsMarried" boolean NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"FilePath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"FileName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"HasProofUploaded" boolean NULL,
	"FileType" int NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC074B6A13E2" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeDependents_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeExperienceDetail" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeExperienceDetail";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeExperienceDetail" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"CompanyName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IsInfoLatestYear" boolean NOT NULL,
	"Experience" int NOT NULL,
	"IsAnyGap" boolean NOT NULL,
	"ReasonOfGap" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"GapYearFrom" timestamp NULL,
	"GapYearTo" timestamp NULL,
	"HasUploadedGapCertificate" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"GapCertificateDocName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"GapCertificateDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"HasUploadedBankStatement" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsWFH" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"WorkingCountryId" int NULL,
	"WorkingStateId" int NULL,
	"WorkingDistrictId" int NULL,
	"HasTaxationDoc" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"HasUploadedTaxationDoc" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"TaxationDocFileName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"TaxationDocFilePath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"HasUploadedExperienceLetter" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"ExperienceLetterDocName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"ExperienceLetterDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"HasUploadedJoiningLetter" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"JoiningLetterDocName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"JoiningLetterDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"EmployeeIdOfCompany" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"ColleagueName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"ColleagueDesignation" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"ColleagueContactNumber" varchar(15)  NULL,
	"ReportingManagerName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"ReportingManagerNumber" varchar(15)  NULL,
	"VerificationEmail" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"ReasonForLeaving" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Designation" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"StartDate" timestamp NULL,
	"EndDate" timestamp NULL,
	"IsExperienceVerified" boolean NULL,
	"IsExperienceVerifiedByMail" boolean NULL,
	"IsExperienceVerifiedByCall" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"HasBankStatementUploaded" boolean NULL,
	"BankStatementDocName" nchar(100)  NULL,
	"BankStatementDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"EmployeeExperienceId" bigint NULL,
	"IsForeignExperience" boolean NOT NULL,
	"VisaType" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"WorkPermitNumber" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"VisaDocName" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"VisaDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"WorkPermitDocName" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"WorkPermitDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"ImmigrationStampDocName" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"ImmigrationStampDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"ForeignContractDocName" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"ForeignContractDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"HasVisaUploaded" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"HasWorkPermitUploaded" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"HasImmigrationStampUploaded" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"HasForeignContractUploaded" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07A52190B4" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeExperienceUploadDoc_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_ExperienceDetail_Experience" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeExperienceId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeExperience"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,

	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,

	"IdentityCategoryDocumentId" int NOT NULL,
	"IdentityValue" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"DocumentFileName" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"DocumentFilePath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"HasIdentityUploaded" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"EffectiveFrom" date DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"EffectiveTo" date NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC074FF9BCC1" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeIdentity_Document" FOREIGN KEY ("IdentityCategoryDocumentId") REFERENCES axionpro."IdentityCategoryDocument"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeIdentity_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);

	"EffectiveTo" timestamp NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,

	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,

	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeManagerMapping" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ManagerId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"DepartmentId" int NULL,
	"DesignationId" int NULL,
	"ReportingTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"EffectiveFrom" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"EffectiveTo" timestamp NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC075BB6D3FC" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeManagerMapping_Department" FOREIGN KEY ("DepartmentId") REFERENCES axionpro."Department"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeManagerMapping_Designation" FOREIGN KEY ("DesignationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Designation"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeManagerMapping_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeManagerMapping_Manager" FOREIGN KEY ("ManagerId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeManagerMapping_ReportingType" FOREIGN KEY ("ReportingTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."ReportingType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeManagerMapping_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeePersonalDetail";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeePersonalDetail" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AadhaarNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"PanNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"PassportNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"DrivingLicenseNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"VoterId" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"BloodGroup" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"MaritalStatus" boolean NOT NULL,
	"Nationality" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"EmergencyContactName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"EmergencyContactNumber" varchar(15)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NOT NULL,
	"IsEditAllowed" boolean NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedById" bigint NULL,
	"InfoVerifiedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsInfoVerified" boolean NULL,
	"HasPanIdUploaded" boolean NULL,
	"HasAadhaarIdUploaded" boolean NULL,
	"HasPassportIdUploaded" boolean NULL,
	"PanDocName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"PassportDocName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"AadhaarDocName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"PanDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"PassportDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"AadhaarDocPath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"EmergencyContactRelation" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"UANNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"HasEPFAccount" boolean NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC074796302D" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeePersonalDetail_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);

	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,

	"NewEmployeeTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"ChangeDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"ChangedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(200)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC0779153EAD" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeStatusHistory_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeStatusHistory_NewEmployeeType" FOREIGN KEY ("NewEmployeeTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeType"("Id"),

);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."LeaveRule";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."LeaveRule" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"PolicyLeaveTypeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"ApplySandwichRule" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsLinkedSandwichRule" boolean NULL,
	"IsHalfDayAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"HalfDayNoticeHours" int NULL,
	"NoticePeriodDays" int NULL,
	"MaxContinuousLeaves" int NULL,
	"MinGapBetweenLeaves" int NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeleteById" bigint NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LeaveRul__3214EC07C443E6FB" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_LeaveRule_PolicyLeaveType" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyLeaveTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyLeaveTypeMapping"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_LeaveRule_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);

	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"LeaveRuleId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"LeaveSandwichRuleId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"DayCombinationId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LeaveSan__3214EC07EB5FE9CE" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_DayCombination" FOREIGN KEY ("DayCombinationId") REFERENCES axionpro."DayCombination"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_LeaveRule" FOREIGN KEY ("LeaveRuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."LeaveRule"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_SandwichRule" FOREIGN KEY ("LeaveSandwichRuleId") REFERENCES axionpro."LeaveSandwichRule"("Id")
);

	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,

	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdateById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdateDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean NULL,
	"SoftDeletedBy" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,

	CONSTRAINT "FK_LeaveType_TenantId" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."LoginCredential" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."LoginCredential";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."LoginCredential" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"LoginId" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Password" varchar(550)  NULL,
	"HasFirstLogin" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsPasswordChangeRequired" boolean NULL,
	"MacAddress" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Latitude" float DEFAULT 0.0 NULL,
	"Longitude" float DEFAULT 0.0 NULL,
	"LoginDevice" int DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"IpAddressLocal" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IpAddressPublic" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LoginCre__3214EC0750429DFA" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ_LoginId" UNIQUE ("LoginId"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_LoginCredential_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);
