-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."OrganizationHolidayCalendar";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."OrganizationHolidayCalendar" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"CountryCode" varchar(5)  NOT NULL,
	"StateCode" varchar(10)  NULL,
	"HolidayYear" int NOT NULL,
	"HolidayName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"HolidayDate" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"IsOptional" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Organiza__3214EC077FBA239C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_OrganizationHolidayCalendar_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."PolicyType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."PolicyType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."PolicyType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"PolicyName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" text  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDelete" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdateById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdateDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeleteById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsStructured" boolean NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__PolicyTy__3214EC07AAE08A64" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_PolicyType_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."RefreshToken" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."RefreshToken";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."RefreshToken" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"LoginId" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Token" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
    "ExpiryDate" timestamp DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '5 day') NOT NULL,
	"IsRevoked" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"CreatedAt" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"CreatedByIp" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"RevokedAt" timestamp NULL,
	"RevokedByIp" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"ReplacedByToken" varchar(500)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__RefreshT__3214EC0731D02168" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__RefreshTo__Login__7132C993" FOREIGN KEY ("LoginId") REFERENCES axionpro."LoginCredential"("LoginId") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."RequestType" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."RequestType";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."RequestType" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"RequestTypeName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__RequestT__3214EC07E53AD996" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "UQ_RequestType_Tenant" UNIQUE ("TenantId", "RequestTypeName"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_RequestType_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenderServiceProvider" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenderServiceProvider";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenderServiceProvider" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenderServiceSpecificationId" int NOT NULL,
	"ServiceProviderId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsInHouse" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"ContractAmount" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"ContractStartDate" date NULL,
	"ContractEndDate" date NULL,
	"IsPrimaryProvider" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"StatusId" int NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenderSe__3214EC0765F55078" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenderServiceProvider_TenderServiceSpecification" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderServiceSpecificationId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderServiceSpecification"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TenderSer__Statu__4589517F" FOREIGN KEY ("StatusId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderStatus"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TenderSer__Tende__467D75B8" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderServiceSpecificationId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderServiceType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TravelAllowancePolicyByDesignation" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TravelAllowancePolicyByDesignation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TravelAllowancePolicyByDesignation" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"DesignationId" int NOT NULL,
	"TravelModeId" int NULL,
	"TravelClass" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"MinTravelDistance" int NULL,
	"MaxTravelDistance" int NULL,
	"ReimbursementPerKM" decimal(10,2) NULL,
	"IsMetro" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"MetroBonus" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"RequiredDocuments" text  NULL,
	"AdvanceAllowed" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"MaxAdvanceAmount" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDelete" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"AddedById" int NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TravelAl__3214EC072DD6C86A" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TravelAll__Desig__4959E263" FOREIGN KEY ("DesignationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Designation"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TravelAll__Emplo__4A4E069C" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TravelAll__Polic__4B422AD5" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."UserAttendanceSetting" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."UserAttendanceSetting";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."UserAttendanceSetting" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDeviceTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"WorkstationTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"GeofenceLatitude" decimal(10,8) NULL,
	"GeofenceLongitude" decimal(10,8) NULL,
	"IsGeofenceEnabled" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"ReportingTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__UserAtte__3214EC0750CE7646" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_UserAttendanceSetting_AttendanceDeviceType" FOREIGN KEY ("AttendanceDeviceTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."AttendanceDeviceType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_UserAttendanceSetting_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE,
	CONSTRAINT "FK_UserAttendanceSetting_WorkstationType" FOREIGN KEY ("WorkstationTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."WorkstationType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."UserRole" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."UserRole";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."UserRole" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NULL,
	"RoleId" int NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"IsPrimaryRole" boolean NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"AssignedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"RemovedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"AssignedById" bigint NULL,
	"RoleStartDate" timestamp NULL,
	"ApprovalRequired" boolean NULL,
	"ApprovalStatus" nchar(20)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__UserRole__3214EC07C9E25EB9" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Role_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_UserRole_Role" FOREIGN KEY ("RoleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Role"("Id")
);

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AccoumndationAllowancePolicyByDesignation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AccoumndationAllowancePolicyByDesignation" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"DesignationId" int NOT NULL,
	"MinDaysRequired" int DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"FixedStayAllowance" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"IsMetro" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"MetroBonus" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"RequiredDocuments" text  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDelete" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"AddedById" int NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" int NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Accoumnd__3214EC071BDF4022" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Accoumnda__Desig__11158940" FOREIGN KEY ("DesignationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Designation"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Accoumnda__Emplo__1209AD79" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__Accoumnda__Polic__12FDD1B2" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."Asset" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."Asset";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."Asset" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AssetName" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"AssetTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"Company" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"Color" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"IsRepairable" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"Price" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"SerialNumber" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Barcode" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"Qrcode" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"PurchaseDate" timestamp NULL,
	"WarrantyExpiryDate" timestamp NULL,
	"Size" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"ModelNo" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"Weight" varchar(50)  NULL,
	"AssetStatusId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsAssigned" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Asset__3214EC076178ABAE" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Asset_AssetStatus" FOREIGN KEY ("AssetStatusId") REFERENCES axionpro."AssetStatus"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_Asset_AssetType" FOREIGN KEY ("AssetTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."AssetType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AssetAssignment" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetAssignment";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetAssignment" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AssetId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"IsApproved" boolean NULL,
	"ApprovalId" bigint NULL,
	"AssignedDate" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"ExpectedReturnDate" timestamp NULL,
	"ActualReturnDate" timestamp NULL,
	"AssignmentStatusId" int NOT NULL,
	"AssetConditionAtAssign" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"AssetConditionAtReturn" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"IdentificationMethod" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"IdentificationValue" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedByDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdateById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedByDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetAss__3214EC07CFA2D85C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetAssignment_Asset" FOREIGN KEY ("AssetId") REFERENCES axionpro."Asset"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetAssignment_AssignmentStatus" FOREIGN KEY ("AssignmentStatusId") REFERENCES axionpro."AssignmentStatus"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetAssignment_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AssetHistory" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetHistory";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetHistory" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"AssetId" int NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NULL,
	"AssignedDate" timestamp NULL,
	"ReturnedDate" timestamp NULL,
	"AssignmentStatusId" int NOT NULL,
	"AssetConditionAtAssign" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"AssetConditionAtReturn" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IdentificationMethod" varchar(50)  NOT NULL,
	"IdentificationValue" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"IsScrapped" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"ScrapReason" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"ScrapApprovedBy" bigint NULL,
	"ScrapDate" timestamp NULL,
	"Remarks" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdateById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetHis__3214EC07599816A6" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__AssetHist__Assig__7AF13DF7" FOREIGN KEY ("AssignmentStatusId") REFERENCES axionpro."AssignmentStatus"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__AssetHist__Emplo__79FD19BE" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__AssetHist__Scrap__7BE56230" FOREIGN KEY ("ScrapApprovedBy") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AssetImage" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetImage";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetImage" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AssetId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AssetImageType" int NOT NULL,
	"AssetImagePath" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(250)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsPrimary" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetIma__3214EC0752335BEC" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetImage_Asset" FOREIGN KEY ("AssetId") REFERENCES axionpro."Asset"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AssetTicketTypeDetail";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AssetTicketTypeDetail" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TicketTypeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AssetTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"ResponsibleRoleId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
    "AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__AssetTic__3214EC0706DC5F37" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AssetType_AssetTckTypeDetail_ID" FOREIGN KEY ("AssetTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."AssetType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_ResponsibleRole_AssetTckTypeDetail_ID" FOREIGN KEY ("ResponsibleRoleId") REFERENCES axionpro."Role"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TckType_AstTypeDetail_ID" FOREIGN KEY ("TicketTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."TicketType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."AttendanceHistory" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."AttendanceHistory";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."AttendanceHistory" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AttendanceDate" date NOT NULL,
	"InTime" timestamp NULL,
	"OutTime" timestamp NULL,
	"TotalWorkHours" decimal(5,2) NULL,
	"TotalBreakHours" decimal(5,2) NULL,
	"Status" varchar(20)  NOT NULL,
	"Remarks" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT NULL NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Attendan__3214EC07AC1B1F0C" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_AttendanceHistory_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."CompanyPolicyDocument";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."CompanyPolicyDocument" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"DocumentTitle" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"FileName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"FilePath" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__CompanyP__3214EC07BADB592E" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_CompanyPolicyDocument_PolicyType" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeLeaveBalance" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeLeaveBalance";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeLeaveBalance" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NULL,
	"EmployeeLeavePolicyMappingId" bigint NULL,
	"LeaveYear" int NOT NULL,
	"OpeningBalance" decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
	"Availed" decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
	"CurrentBalance" decimal(5,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS ("OpeningBalance" - "Availed") STORED,
	"CarryForwarded" decimal(5,2) NULL,
	"Encashed" decimal(5,2) NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"LeavesOnHold" decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsAllBalanceOnHold" boolean NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07B6CC8062" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeLeaveBalance_EmployeeLeavePolicyMapping" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeLeavePolicyMappingId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeLeavePolicyMapping"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeLeaveBalance_Tenant" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."InsurancePolicy" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."InsurancePolicy";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."InsurancePolicy" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"InsurancePolicyName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"InsurancePolicyNumber" varchar(100)  NOT NULL,
	"ProviderName" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"StartDate" timestamp NULL,
	"EndDate" timestamp NULL,
	"AgentName" varchar(150)  NULL,
	"AgentContactNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"AgentOfficeNumber" varchar(20)  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"Description" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"DeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"EmployeeAllowed" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"MaxSpouseAllowed" int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
	"MaxChildAllowed" int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
	"CountryId" int NULL,
	"ParentsAllowed" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"InLawsAllowed" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__PolicyMa__3214EC07A7865FF0" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InsurancePolicy_Country" FOREIGN KEY ("CountryId") REFERENCES axionpro."Country"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InsurancePolicy_PolicyType" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."InsurancePolicyDocument" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."InsurancePolicyDocument";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."InsurancePolicyDocument" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"InsurancePolicyId" int NOT NULL,
	"FileName" varchar(200)  NOT NULL,
	"FilePath" varchar(500)  NOT NULL,
	"FileType" int NOT NULL,
	"LanguageCode" varchar(10)  NOT NULL,
	"DocumentType" varchar(20)  NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeletedById" bigint NULL,
	"SoftDeletedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Insuranc__3214EC07B3D0A432" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InsurancePolicyDocument_InsurancePolicy" FOREIGN KEY ("InsurancePolicyId") REFERENCES axionpro."InsurancePolicy"("Id")
);

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."InterviewPanelMember";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."InterviewPanelMember" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PanelId" int NOT NULL,
	"UserRoleId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsApproved" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(255)  NULL,
	"Remarks" varchar(255)  NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Intervie__3214EC07205CE980" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InterviewPanelMember_Panel" FOREIGN KEY ("PanelId") REFERENCES axionpro."InterviewPanel"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE,
	CONSTRAINT "FK_InterviewPanelMember_UserRole" FOREIGN KEY ("UserRoleId") REFERENCES axionpro."UserRole"("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);


-- axionpro."LeaveRequest" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."LeaveRequest";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."LeaveRequest" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"LeaveTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"FromDate" date NOT NULL,
	"ToDate" date NOT NULL,
	"IsHalfDay" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"HalfDayDate" date NULL,
	"IsFirstHalf" boolean NULL,
	"TotalLeaveDays" decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
	"Reason" varchar(500)  NULL,
	"Status" int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
	"ApprovedById" bigint NULL,
	"ApprovedDate" timestamp NULL,
	"LeavePolicyId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"IsSandwich" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"CreatedById" bigint NOT NULL,
	"CreatedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"CancellationDate" timestamp NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(100)  NULL,
	"IsDocumentAttached" boolean NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__LeaveReq__3214EC07D95D9BAD" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__LeaveRequ__Emplo__05EEBAAE" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__LeaveRequ__Leave__06E2DEE7" FOREIGN KEY ("LeaveTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."LeaveType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__LeaveRequ__Leave__07D70320" FOREIGN KEY ("LeavePolicyId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyLeaveTypeMapping"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__LeaveRequ__Tenan__04FA9675" FOREIGN KEY ("TenantId") REFERENCES axionpro."Tenant"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."MealAllowancePolicyByDesignation" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."MealAllowancePolicyByDesignation";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."MealAllowancePolicyByDesignation" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"DesignationId" int NOT NULL,
	"MinDaysRequired" int DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	"FixedFoodAllowance" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"BreakfastAllowance" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"LunchAllowance" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"DinnerAllowance" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"IsMetro" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"MetroBonus" decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NULL,
	"RequiredDocuments" text  NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"IsSoftDelete" boolean DEFAULT false NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"AddedById" int NOT NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"UpdatedById" int NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__MealAllo__3214EC07BB4E4E52" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__MealAllow__Desig__39237A9A" FOREIGN KEY ("DesignationId") REFERENCES axionpro."Designation"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__MealAllow__Emplo__3A179ED3" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."EmployeeType"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__MealAllow__Polic__3B0BC30C" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."PolicyTypeInsuranceMapping" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."PolicyTypeInsuranceMapping";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."PolicyTypeInsuranceMapping" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"PolicyTypeId" int NOT NULL,
	"InsurancePolicyId" int NOT NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"SoftDeleteDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	"SoftDeleteById" bigint NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__PolicyTy__3214EC07E433096D" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_PTIM_InsurancePolicy" FOREIGN KEY ("InsurancePolicyId") REFERENCES axionpro."InsurancePolicy"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_PTIM_PolicyType" FOREIGN KEY ("PolicyTypeId") REFERENCES axionpro."PolicyType"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."TenderProject" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."TenderProject";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."TenderProject" (
	"Id" int GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenderServiceProviderId" int NOT NULL,
	"ProjectName" varchar(255)  NOT NULL,
	"Description" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"Remark" varchar(1000)  NULL,
	"UserRoleId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"StatusId" int NOT NULL,
	"StartDate" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL,
	"EndDate" timestamp NULL,
	"EstimatedBudget" decimal(18,2) NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NULL,
	"ExpectedTeamSize" int NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__TenderPr__3214EC073A6AC46E" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_TenderProject_TenderServiceProvider" FOREIGN KEY ("TenderServiceProviderId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderServiceProvider"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TenderPro__Statu__40C49C62" FOREIGN KEY ("StatusId") REFERENCES axionpro."TenderStatus"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK__TenderPro__UserR__42ACE4D4" FOREIGN KEY ("UserRoleId") REFERENCES axionpro."UserRole"("Id")
);


-- axionpro."EmployeeInsuranceMapping" definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE axionpro."EmployeeInsuranceMapping";

CREATE TABLE axionpro."EmployeeInsuranceMapping" (
	"Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
	"TenantId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"EmployeeId" bigint NOT NULL,
	"InsurancePolicyId" int NOT NULL,
	"CoverageStartDate" date NOT NULL,
	"CoverageEndDate" date NULL,
	"IsActive" boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
	"IsSoftDeleted" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"AddedById" bigint NULL,
	"AddedDateTime" timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
	"UpdatedById" bigint NULL,
	"UpdatedDateTime" timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "PK__Employee__3214EC07EADC980E" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeInsuranceMapping_Employee" FOREIGN KEY ("EmployeeId") REFERENCES axionpro."Employee"("Id"),
	CONSTRAINT "FK_EmployeeInsuranceMapping_InsurancePolicy" FOREIGN KEY ("InsurancePolicyId") REFERENCES axionpro."InsurancePolicy"("Id")
);
